_about: Example binding map for the xenodot-twin try-it kit's PLANT demo — a synthetic-plant digital-twin story over the generated plant.ifc shipped beside this file (plant.ifc, a synthetic demonstration model; see NOTICE.md). Each row binds a process-telemetry tag to a REAL IFC element by its 22-char GlobalId (the twin-import join key). The GlobalIds below are for the VENDORED plant.ifc — generated by gen_plant_ifc.py at its default --seed 42 (4 tanks, 3 pumps), and DETERMINISTIC across converts of the same file — so they work as-is against a GLB/sidecar you build from the bundled plant.ifc. If you regenerate the model with a DIFFERENT --seed or --tanks/--pumps, the GlobalIds change: re-run tools/ifc_convert.py to produce models/plant_props.json (the sidecar, keyed by GlobalId) and re-derive each id before authoring — `node -e 'const s=require("./models/plant_props.json");const id="2wpxFG2n_HOywVzNz3jwEc";console.log(s[id]?.ifc_class,"|",s[id]?.name)'` should print the ifc_class + name shown in that row's 'ifc' key. Never trust ids copied from a different model or seed. JSON has no comments, so each row documents itself in 'ifc'/'note'. The tags speak the sim's built-in plant vocabulary (tools/sim/stream.js DEMO_TAGS: pump temp/flow, tank level, valve position, motor rpm), and the sim (tools/sim/server.js --map) derives its tag list and each tag's [min,max] straight from this file, so data and geometry never drift. Ramps: temperature cold->hot = blue #1e63ff -> red #ff2f2f; flow low->high = dark #14142a -> cyan #39d0ff; tank level empty->full = dark #14142a -> green #37d67a; motor rpm idle->max = dark #14142a -> amber #ffcf3f; valve position closed->open = green #37d67a -> red #ff5252 (a floating Label3D, a status readout rather than a paint).

bindings.ifc: IfcPump / P-101 Feed Pump (first pump on the skid)
bindings.note: Feed-pump casing temperature in Celsius; 20 C = cool/blue, 90 C = hot/red.

bindings.ifc: IfcPump / P-102 Transfer Pump (second pump on the skid)
bindings.note: Transfer-pump discharge flow in m3/h; 0 = dark, 100 = bright cyan (full flow).

bindings.ifc: IfcPump / P-103 Circulation Pump (third pump — stands in for its drive motor)
bindings.note: Circulation-pump motor speed in rpm; 0 = idle/dark, 3000 = max/amber.

bindings.ifc: IfcTank / TK-101 Buffer Tank (first tank in the farm)
bindings.note: Buffer-tank level in percent full; 0 = empty/dark, 100 = full/green.

bindings.ifc: IfcTank / TK-102 Feed Tank (second tank in the farm)
bindings.note: Feed-tank level in percent full; same empty->full dark->green ramp as TK-101.

bindings.ifc: IfcTank / TK-103 Product Tank (third tank in the farm)
bindings.note: Product-tank level in percent full; same empty->full dark->green ramp.

bindings.ifc: IfcValve / V-101 Shutoff Valve (inline on branch BR-1 to P-101)
bindings.note: Branch-1 shutoff-valve position as a floating Label3D: 0 % = closed (green), 100 % = open (red). Label response, not a paint, so it reads as a status readout.

bindings.ifc: IfcValve / V-102 Shutoff Valve (inline on branch BR-2 to P-102)
bindings.note: Branch-2 shutoff-valve position as a floating Label3D; same closed(green)->open(red) ramp as V-101.
